tasks.task_description: How to redesign BiteDash's online food delivery platform using a microservices-based architecture to address existing performance, scalability, flexibility, and reliability issues?

sub_tasks.name: Define Communication & Data Handling. (How will microservices communicate with each other? Will each service have its own database, or will some services share data?)
Plan the Migration Strategy. (Which services will be migrated first? How will the transition be handled without disrupting users?)
Design the Architecture Diagram & API Structure.
Create a PowerPoint Presentation covering all points.

tasks.context: BiteDash is an online food delivery platform facing challenges with performance, scalability, flexibility, and reliability due to its monolithic architecture and growing user base. The platform experiences slow response times during peak hours, system slowdowns, increased server costs, difficulties with new feature deployment, and ripple effects from failures in one area. The task is to act as a Microservices Architect and propose a microservices-based architecture to overcome these challenges, enhance flexibility, allow independent scaling and updates, and provide a more efficient food delivery experience. The final deliverable is a PowerPoint Presentation covering all the required points.
